---
title: "Tool title"
---

Standalone interactive or explainer page. Set `gallery: true` in `manifest.yml` to list on **Tools**.

Optional WASM widget:

```{python}
#| echo: false
# from scipy.stats import norm
# from libdpy.visualization.privacy_plots import PrivacyPlot
# PrivacyPlot(sensitivity=1, std=1.5, distribution_types=[norm]).embed()
```
